stemHtml: What does the logarithmic scale of a Vertical Speed Indicator (VSI) mean?

options.a: A small rate of change in ROC and ROD can be read more accurately than a large rate of change.
options.b: A large rate of change is displayed more accurately than a small rate of change.
options.c: All rates of climb and descent are displayed with the same accuracy.
options.d: The VSI only reads correctly under ISA conditions.
